subtitle.en: Sounds, salutations, and grammar terminology — orient yourself before the lessons start.

milestone.en: Can pronounce Belgian Dutch vowel sounds, exchange basic greetings, and read grammar rules without being thrown by the terminology.

reference.note: Bookmark this — every grammar rule below uses these terms.
The position-1/2/3 model gets used heavily from Module 3 onwards.

vocabulary.note: Useful phrases (yes, no, please, thank you) — handy from day one.

uitspraak.note: The short-vs-long vowel rule is the foundation of Dutch spelling.
Three look-alike sounds that trip every learner.
The 'soft g' that defines Belgian Dutch.

tests.note: Run this once you're comfortable with the vowel rules.
